candidate_title: Zora Factory Intake Template — Production Run Intake v0.1
candidate_summary: A structured intake form for ingesting candidate data from external sources before Computer Wisdom structures it into receipts.
known: Intake template is not a receipt.
No onchain verification happens at intake stage.
unknown: Which Zora Factory event types should auto-fill intake fields.
Whether intake should be stored as JSON or database row.
How to handle partial or conflicting intake data.
missing_receipts: No real intake example has been frozen as a receipt.
No link between intake template and PR #110 has been sealed beyond this draft artifact.
